title: Run checkpoint skill for coherent completed MVP slice

do_not_read: other directories in ~/dev unless explicitly referenced

scope: Checkpoint the completed coherent MVP slice as required by project instructions.
goals: Update today's daily note with concise work performed and verification state.
Commit only the coherent current-task slice if safe, without reverting unrelated user changes.
If committing is unsafe due unrelated changes, document exact reason and leave handoff.
non_goals: Do not modify implementation except checkpoint metadata/daily note.
Do not revert unrelated deletions or untracked files.
safety: Do not run destructive git commands.
Do not commit unrelated user changes.
success_criteria: Daily note and commit state are clear.
